MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-17-2011 IN 206, PLAINTIFF KATE PESSOA'S MOTION TO SET PREFERENTIAL TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (G). THE ASSIGNMENT OF PREFERENTIAL TRIAL DATE SHALL NOT BE CONSTRUED AS A FINDING THAT THERE HAS BEEN A WAIVER OF DEFENDANTS' RIGHT TO ENFORCE THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT, AND THAT THE ISSUE OF WAIVER, IF ANY, IS RESERVED TO THE DISCRETION OF THE LAW AND MOTION JUDGE WHO HEARS THE MOTIONS TO COMPEL ARBITRATION ON 3/29/11. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 12/5/11 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. WRITTEN ORDER IS PENDING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
